message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="4 of 5 tasks done, only aria-live remains">
Status update — almost done!

- Task #1 (a11y error elements): DONE, CI green
- Task #2 (Forgot password link): DONE, CI green
- Task #3 (HTMX enhancement): DONE, CI green (57 tests)
- Task #5 (Password toggle): DONE, CI green

**One task remaining: Task #4 (aria-live announcements).** Luca is driving.

Everyone else: stand by for final review. Once Task #4 is committed and CI green, all polish work is complete.

Reminder: ONE DRIVER (Luca). Do not modify files.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Excellent progress -- 4 of 5 tasks done. Let me review what's landed for Tasks #3 and #5 since those are significant product changes, while Luca drives Task #4.

content.text:
Good. Here's my product review of Tasks #3 and #5:

**Task #3 (HTMX Enhancement) -- Product Review:**
- `todos.html` (line 15-16): Add form has `hx-post="/todos"`, targets the `.todo-list`, swaps `beforeend`. Form resets on success via `hx-on::after-request`. This matches the user story: "item is appended to the list without page reload" and "input field is cleared."
- `todo_item.html` (line 2-3): Toggle uses `hx-post` with `hx-target="#todo-{{ todo.id }}"` and `hx-swap="outerHTML"` -- replaces the item in place. Correct.
- `todo_item.html` (line 16-17): Delete uses the same pattern -- `hx-post` with `outerHTML` swap. When the server returns empty, the item disappears from the DOM. Correct.
- Edit link (line 10) is still a plain `<a>` tag -- navigates to the edit page. No inline HTMX editing yet, but that's acceptable for MVP. The edit page itself works.
- `base.html` (line 24): HTMX script loaded on all pages. Good.
- `base.html` (line 23): aria-live region already in place (`id="live-region"`) -- ready for Task #4.
- Progressive enhancement: All forms have standard `method="post"` and `action` attributes, so they work without JS. The HTMX attributes are purely additive. Non-negotiable requirement met.

**Task #5 (Password Toggle) -- Product Review:**
- Script loads only on registration page via `{% block scripts %}` (register.html line 6). Correct -- login page doesn't need it.
- IIFE pattern, graceful degradation: if elements don't exist, it returns silently. Good.
- On load: removes confirm group, adds "Show password" toggle button. Matches US-1 consensus exactly.
- Toggle behavior: switches between `password`/`text` input types, updates `aria-label` and `aria-pressed`, removes/restores confirm field. Matches the agreed approach.
- Button text matches aria-label ("Show password" / "Hide password"). Accessible and clear.
- No-JS baseline: confirm group stays in DOM, both password fields work normally. Progressive enhancement requirement met.

Both changes look solid from a product perspective. All that remains is Task #4 (aria-live announcements), which Luca is driving now. The `live-region` div is already in `base.html` -- Luca just needs to populate it with announcement text after HTMX operations.

input.content:
Product review of Tasks #3 and #5: both approved.

**Task #3 (HTMX)**:
- Add, toggle, delete all enhanced with HTMX -- no full page reloads
- Progressive enhancement verified: all forms still have standard method/action attributes
- Input clears after adding (hx-on::after-request reset)
- aria-live region already in base.html, ready for Task #4

**Task #5 (Password toggle)**:
- Matches US-1 consensus exactly: toggle replaces confirm field when JS active
- Correct aria-label/aria-pressed behavior
- Graceful degradation: no-JS baseline works unchanged
- Script only loads on registration page

One observation: inline editing for todos (US-8 says "HTMX enhances: inline editing without page navigation") currently still navigates to a separate edit page. This is acceptable for MVP -- the feature works, it's just not enhanced yet. We could note this as a future improvement if we want.

Ready for Task #4 (aria-live) -- the last piece. After that, all MVP polish is complete.
input.summary: Product review of Tasks 3 and 5: approved

Product review of Tasks #3 and #5: both approved.

**Task #3 (HTMX)**:
- Add, toggle, delete all enhanced with HTMX -- no full page reloads
- Progressive enhancement verified: all forms still have standard method/action attributes
- Input clears after adding (hx-on::after-request reset)
- aria-live region already in base.html, ready for Task #4

**Task #5 (Password toggle)**:
- Matches US-1 consensus exactly: toggle replaces confirm field when JS active
- Correct aria-label/aria-pressed behavior
- Graceful degradation: no-JS baseline works unchanged
- Script only loads on registration page

One observation: inline editing for todos (US-8 says "HTMX enhances: inline editing without page navigation") currently still navigates to a separate edit page. This is acceptable for MVP -- the feature works, it's just not enhanced yet. We could note this as a future improvement if we want.

Ready for Task #4 (aria-live) -- the last piece. After that, all MVP polish is complete.

content.text: Product reviews sent. Standing by for Luca to complete Task #4 (aria-live announcements) -- the final piece of MVP polish. Once that's committed and CI green, all five polish tasks will be complete and the MVP will meet our Definition of Done.
